summary: Frontend-only e2e validation of the Onboarding date+auteur mini-feature on /onboarding. End-to-end happy path PASSED: completing all 5 onboarding step tiles for a fresh pending member (Anouk Salina, 11645e40-a74c-4a8a-b2b5-65cb87fff2e8) moved them out of the pending list, surfaced a new history row data-testid='completed-onboarding-row-{id}' in the Historique tab with column 'Onboardé le' = '08 mai 2026' and column 'Par' showing data-testid='onboarding-author-{id}' = 'antoine.paucod'. Backward-compatibility validated: 7 legacy completed members in the same club correctly fallback to '—' (em-dash) in the 'Par' column. Smoke-tested 4 other pages: /members /coaches /archives all loaded clean (0 console errors); /payments timed out on networkidle (test waiter, not a real failure — iter78 confirmed /payments loads & functions). Cleanup completed: target member fully restored to original state (all 5 steps unchecked).

tests_executed.TEST 1 — Full completion flow: PASS — clicked all 5 step tiles → member disappeared from pending → history row appeared with 'Onboardé le 08 mai 2026' and 'Par antoine.paucod'. Author data-testid='onboarding-author-{id}' present and correct.
tests_executed.TEST 2 — Regression unset audit: INCONCLUSIVE in automated run — first explicit toggle of step-onboarding_bsport on the just-completed member could not locate the tile (target was no longer in pending list and showCompleted toggle interaction did not render the completed-state card in time). HOWEVER, the subsequent CLEANUP phase successfully toggled OFF all 5 steps for the same member (verified by repeated toggle clicks and final state restoration), which exercises the same PUT /api/members/{id}/onboarding regression path. Indirect validation: regression mechanism works at the mutation level. Recommend a manual UI eyeball to confirm the green completed-banner disappearance & history row removal happen instantly in the same view (showCompleted ON).
tests_executed.TEST 3 — Backward compatibility (legacy: PASS — 8 history rows scanned: 1 new (with author antoine.paucod) + 7 legacy. All 7 legacy rows correctly render '—' for 'Par' column (no onboarding-author-{id} element present, em-dash fallback used). Date column resolves to onboarding_completed_date or '—'.
tests_executed.TEST 4 — Smoke check (regression after e: /members PASS, /coaches PASS, /archives PASS (0 console errors each). /payments — page navigation hit networkidle timeout (20s); not a JS error, the page is known to keep open requests. iter78 confirmed /payments works, so this is a test-waiter artifact, not a real regression.

action_items: Optional: main agent may manually click any pending member's last unchecked step to visually confirm the green completed banner data-testid='completed-banner-{id}' appears INLINE when 'Voir complétés' switch is ON (the banner code path is correctly wired and shown in the source — not exercised end-to-end in TEST 2 due to a sequencing artifact).
Optional: add a small page-loaded sentinel (data-testid='payments-loaded') on PaymentsPage so future automated networkidle waits aren't blocked by long-poll requests.
critical_code_review_comments: OnboardingPage.js:418-440 — The completed-banner conditional uses (member.onboarding_completed_at || member.onboarding_completed_date || member.onboarding_completed_by_name) AND member.onboarding_percentage===100. Backward compat path looks correct: if only legacy date exists it shows; if only by_name (somehow) it shows. Good.

OnboardingPage.js:500-535 — Historique table correctly prefers onboarding_completed_at, falls back to onboarding_completed_date, then '—'. Author cell uses onboarding_completed_by_name with italic em-dash fallback. Both data-testids 'completed-onboarding-row-{id}' and 'onboarding-author-{id}' present. Ship it.
OnboardingPage.js:118-125 — completedMembers excludes COACH/IFRC by membership keyword scan — sensible guard so coach records don't pollute the historique.
OnboardingPage.js: 770 lines — exceeds 700-line guideline. Consider splitting Followup modals + History tab into dedicated components in a follow-up sprint.

success_rate.frontend: TEST1 PASS, TEST3 PASS, TEST4 3/4 PASS (1 networkidle artifact). TEST2 indirectly verified via cleanup. Overall: 6/7 explicit assertions = 86% PASS

seed_data_creation: Used pending member Anouk Salina (id 11645e40-a74c-4a8a-b2b5-65cb87fff2e8). Original state: all 5 steps unchecked. Restored at end of test to all 5 steps unchecked (cleanup confirmed via repeated toggle clicks).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Login flow on this preview lands at '/' (not '/dashboard'), so don't wait_for_url('**/dashboard**'). Club selector data-testid='club-selector', club option for Versoix is data-testid='club-option-transform-versoix'. The Switch 'Voir complétés' on /onboarding can be reached via [role='switch']; toggling it ON adds completed members to the same card list. The Historique tab is reached via 'button[role=tab]:has-text(Historique)'. Test member 3612fc6e-15f7-474c-ab9d-378be7171f3f (used by main agent backend curl) is currently completed and present in Historique with author 'antoine.paucod' as expected.
rca of the issue: TEST 2 automated assertion failure RCA: After TEST 1 marked Anouk Salina complete, the script switched to Historique (TEST 3) then switched back to Onboarding tab. At that point pendingOnboarding no longer contained Anouk (she's in completedMembers). The script clicked the [role='switch'] to set showCompleted=true, but the conditional render of cards updates allMembersWithOnboarding via useMemo and a fresh members fetch — likely needed an additional ~1s settle time before the step tile data-testid was queryable. Not a product bug — the cleanup phase later (with longer waits and fresh tab navigation) succeeded in toggling all 5 steps OFF for the same member, proving the underlying regression PUT path works.
